summary: Completed backend API testing for Notifications and SupporterBadge features. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing blocked by Expo ngrok tunnel error (520) - infrastructure issue, not code issue.

integration_issues.issue: Cloudflare Error 520 - ngrok tunnel connection issues. This is an infrastructure problem, not a code bug.

action_items: Infrastructure: Expo ngrok tunnel having connection issues (Error 520) - may need to restart expo or check ngrok configuration
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/notifications correctly returns list of notifications for authenticated user
✅ GET /api/favors returns creator_is_supporter boolean field for each favor
✅ SupporterBadge.tsx properly exports SupporterBadge, SupporterProfileBorder, and UserNameWithBadge components
✅ Skeleton.tsx exports MapMarkersSkeleton for map loading state
✅ notifications.tsx page correctly fetches and displays notifications with proper formatting
✅ index.tsx (home) implements notification bell icon with unread count badge and 30-second polling
✅ map.tsx uses MapMarkersSkeleton during loading and shows SupporterBadge on favor circles for supporters
✅ chat/[favorId].tsx displays UserNameWithBadge in header and SupporterProfileBorder around message avatars
⚠️ TypeScript minor errors in oggettoteca.tsx and ProfileCompletionBar.tsx (unrelated to tested features)

success_rate.frontend: Unable to test - Expo tunnel error 520

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend notification APIs fully tested and working. Frontend Expo tunnel has issues causing 520 errors. The code implementation looks correct - SupporterBadge is properly integrated in chat header, map markers, and home page feed. MapMarkersSkeleton is used in map.tsx during loading. Notifications page is at /notifications route. Bell icon in home header uses data-testid='notifications-button'. If testing frontend, may need to restart expo service or use mobile emulator instead of web.

GET /api/favors.note: Returns creator_is_supporter boolean field for SupporterBadge display

code_review_features.SupporterBadge_in_chat_header: Implemented in /app/frontend/app/chat/[favorId].tsx using UserNameWithBadge component in header subtitle row
code_review_features.SupporterBadge_on_map_markers: Implemented in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/map.tsx - supporter circles have golden border and SupporterBadge component overlay
code_review_features.MapMarkersSkeleton: Implemented in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/map.tsx - shown during loading state
code_review_features.Notifications_page: Implemented at /app/frontend/app/notifications.tsx with proper list display and mark-as-read functionality
code_review_features.Notification_bell_icon: Implemented in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx header with badge counter and 30s polling
